items.name: utils
items.title: Utils
items.description: The cn() utility — combines clsx and tailwind-merge.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: A button with variant and size props built on CVA.

items.name: tilt-card
items.title: Tilt Card
items.description: 3D perspective tilt with glare effect on mouse move.

items.name: magnetic-button
items.title: Magnetic Button
items.description: Button that magnetically pulls toward the cursor and snaps back.

items.name: animated-beam
items.title: Animated Beam
items.description: Animated beam of light that travels along an SVG path between two elements.

items.name: particles
items.title: Particles
items.description: Interactive canvas particle field with mouse-reactive connections.

items.name: morphing-text
items.title: Morphing Text
items.description: Words that blur and morph into each other on a loop.

items.name: glitch-text
items.title: Glitch Text
items.description: Text with an RGB-split glitch animation effect.

items.name: typewriter-text
items.title: Typewriter Text
items.description: Text that types and deletes itself with a blinking cursor.

items.name: count-up
items.title: Count Up
items.description: Animated number counter that triggers when scrolled into view.

items.name: gradient-text
items.title: Gradient Text
items.description: Text with a flowing animated color gradient.

items.name: glass-card
items.title: Glass Card
items.description: Frosted glass card with backdrop blur and translucent border.

items.name: gradient-mesh
items.title: Gradient Mesh
items.description: Animated soft color mesh background with drifting radial blobs.

items.name: split-text
items.title: Split Text
items.description: Text that animates in character-by-character or word-by-word with stagger.

items.name: spotlight-card
items.title: Spotlight Card
items.description: Card with a radial spotlight that follows the cursor on hover.

items.name: aurora-bg
items.title: Aurora Background
items.description: Canvas-based animated northern lights with blending color blobs.

items.name: dot-grid
items.title: Dot Grid
items.description: Interactive canvas dot grid — dots scale up near the cursor.

items.name: gradient-border
items.title: Gradient Border
items.description: Animated rotating gradient border that wraps any element.

items.name: trail-cursor
items.title: Trail Cursor
items.description: Canvas particle trail that follows the cursor.

items.name: spotlight-cursor
items.title: Spotlight Cursor
items.description: Full-page radial spotlight that smoothly follows the cursor.

items.name: blob-cursor
items.title: Blob Cursor
items.description: Morphing blob that follows the cursor with spring-based lag.

items.name: reveal-on-scroll
items.title: Reveal On Scroll
items.description: Wrapper that fades and slides children in when scrolled into view.

items.name: staggered-list
items.title: Staggered List
items.description: List where each child animates in with a stagger delay on scroll.

items.name: scroll-progress
items.title: Scroll Progress
items.description: Fixed reading progress bar at the top of the page.

items.name: parallax-layer
items.title: Parallax Layer
items.description: Wraps content that moves at a different speed during scroll.

items.name: project-card
items.title: Project Card
items.description: Portfolio project card with image, tags, and live/repo links.

items.name: timeline-item
items.title: Timeline Item
items.description: Experience or education entry with dot connector for timeline sections.

items.name: skill-bar
items.title: Skill Bar
items.description: Animated progress bar for skill levels, triggers on scroll.

items.name: stat-counter
items.title: Stat Counter
items.description: Animated count-up stat with a label for stats sections.

items.name: profile-card
items.title: Profile Card
items.description: Avatar, name, role, bio, and social links card.

items.name: tech-badge
items.title: Tech Badge
items.description: Compact badge for displaying a technology or skill.

items.name: review-card
items.title: Review Card
items.description: Testimonial card with quote, star rating, and author attribution.

items.name: hero-minimal
items.title: Hero Minimal
items.description: Clean centered hero section with name, role, bio, CTAs, and social links.

items.name: hero-bold
items.title: Hero Bold
items.description: Full-bleed hero with an animated aurora canvas background.

items.name: about-section
items.title: About Section
items.description: Two-column about section with avatar, bio paragraphs, tech badges, and links.

items.name: projects-grid
items.title: Projects Grid
items.description: Responsive grid of project cards with images, tags, and live/repo links.

items.name: skills-section
items.title: Skills Section
items.description: Categorized skill badges in animated cards, scroll-triggered reveal.

items.name: stats-row
items.title: Stats Row
items.description: Row of animated count-up stats that trigger on scroll.

items.name: contact-section
items.title: Contact Section
items.description: Minimal contact section with email CTA and social links.
